channel.title: Guide on Provenance - Free iOS & tvOS Retro Game Emulator
channel.description: Recent content in Guide on Provenance - Free iOS & tvOS Retro Game Emulator

item.title: How to Add Games to Provenance
item.description: Provenance supports games from 38+ retro systems, but you need to provide your own ROM files. This guide explains several methods for getting games into Provenance on iPhone, iPad, or Apple TV.

item.title: How to Install Custom Controller Skins
item.description: Provenance supports custom controller skins, letting you replace the default on-screen controls with artwork that more closely matches the original hardware. This guide walks you through finding, downloading, and installing custom skins.

item.title: How to Play on Apple TV with Provenance
item.description: Provenance is one of the only iOS emulators with native Apple TV support, letting you play 38+ retro game systems on your television. This guide covers both the native tvOS app and using AirPlay to mirror from your iPhone or iPad.

item.title: How to Use a Controller with Provenance
item.description: Provenance supports a wide range of physical game controllers on both iOS and tvOS, giving you a much more authentic retro gaming experience. This guide walks you through connecting a controller and getting it working in Provenance.
